enonce.texte: Match the word with its correct definition.

questions.reponse: The surroundings in which we live
Making the environment dirty and harmful
To use something again instead of throwing it away

enonce.texte:
Complete the sentences with words from the box.

clean, recycle, waste, pollution, environment

questions.texte: Do not throw ________ on the streets.
We must ________ our homes and schools.

enonce.texte:
Put the steps in the correct order using the sequence markers: first, then, next, finally.

📝 Steps to clean the environment:

  • Put the trash in a dustbin
  • Collect all the garbage
  • Recycle paper and bottles
  • Check that the area is clean

questions.texte: Write the steps in the correct order using sequence markers.
questions.reponse:
Correct Order:

  1. First, collect all the garbage.
  2. Then, put the trash in a dustbin.
  3. Next, recycle paper and bottles.
  4. Finally, check that the area is clean.

enonce.texte:
Create a slogan to encourage people to keep the environment clean.

📝 A slogan should be:

  • Short and memorable
  • Encouraging people to take action
  • Related to environmental safety

questions.texte: Write your slogan to promote environmental safety.
questions.reponse:
Example Slogans:

  • "Keep our environment clean, keep our nation green!"
  • "Clean today, safe tomorrow!"
  • "Recycle, reduce, reuse - protect our environment!"
  • "A clean environment is a healthy environment."
  • "Don't be mean, keep it clean!"

Evaluation Criteria:

  • Short and memorable
  • Clear message about environmental safety
  • Encourages positive action
  • Correct grammar and spelling

enonce.texte:
Write a short paragraph (4-5 sentences) giving instructions on how to clean the school environment.

📋 Your instructions should:

  • Use sequence markers (first, then, next, finally)
  • Include at least 3 actions
  • Use the imperative form

questions.texte: Write your paragraph giving instructions on how to clean the school environment.
questions.reponse:
Example Answer:

"First, collect all the garbage from the school yard. Then, put the waste in the dustbin or recycling bins. Next, sweep the classrooms and corridors to remove dust and dirt. Finally, check that all areas are clean and tidy. Remember to wash your hands after cleaning!"

Evaluation Criteria:

  • Correct use of sequence markers (first, then, next, finally)
  • Clear and logical steps
  • Use of imperative form
  • Proper grammar and spelling

enonce.texte:
Design a poster for a Health and Environment Club at your school.

📋 Your poster should include:

  • A title
  • A slogan
  • At least 3 tips for environmental safety
  • A call to action for students to join the club
images: An environmental poster with a slogan, tips for keeping the environment clean, and information about a Health and Environment Club at a school in Cameroon

questions.texte: Design your poster for the Health and Environment Club.
questions.reponse:
Example Poster:

🌿 HEALTH & ENVIRONMENT CLUB 🌿

"Keep Our Environment Clean, Keep Our Nation Green!"

📝 Tips for Environmental Safety:

  • Always dispose of waste properly.
  • Recycle paper, plastic, and glass.
  • Keep your surroundings clean and free from pollution.
  • Plant trees and protect nature.

🌟 JOIN US! 🌟

Come to room 12 every Friday after school.

Together, we can make a difference!

Evaluation Criteria:

  • Clear title and slogan
  • At least 3 tips for environmental safety
  • Call to action for club members
  • Creative and visually appealing design
  • Correct grammar and spelling

enonce.texte:
Write 5-6 sentences about why it is important to keep the environment clean and safe.

📝 Your paragraph should:

  • Explain why environmental safety is important
  • Give examples of what people can do
  • Use sequence markers (first, then, next, finally)

questions.texte: Write your paragraph about environmental safety.
questions.reponse:
Example Answer:

"Keeping the environment clean and safe is very important for our health. First, a clean environment prevents diseases because it removes germs and bacteria. Then, it makes our surroundings beautiful and pleasant to live in. Next, it protects animals and plants from pollution. Finally, it helps us breathe fresh and clean air. Everyone should do their part to keep the environment clean because we all depend on it for our survival."

Evaluation Criteria:

  • Clear explanation of why environmental safety is important
  • Specific examples of actions people can take
  • Correct use of sequence markers
  • Proper grammar and spelling
